objective.definition: Deliver per-finger flexion resistance (grasp feel) while keeping linkage cartridges, actuators and electronics field-replaceable and the glove comfortable to don.
objective.failure_rule: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

constraint: each finger cartridge stays individually removable and inspectable

trade_off.gain: reduces per-finger assembly and lets a damaged linkage swap with one pin
trade_off.guardrail: each finger cartridge stays individually removable and inspectable
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

decision.rationale: integrate finger linkage into a single-pin removable cartridge

verification.check: each finger cartridge stays individually removable and inspectable

evolution.leaves_for_next: each finger cartridge stays individually removable and inspectable | mit: Keep each finger as a single-pin removable cartridge with plug-in actuator.

objective.definition: Deliver per-finger flexion resistance (grasp feel) while keeping linkage cartridges, actuators and electronics field-replaceable and the glove comfortable to don.
objective.failure_rule: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

constraint: lid opens without tools and connectors stay reachable

trade_off.gain: fewer harness runs and a single tool-less service lid
trade_off.guardrail: lid opens without tools and connectors stay reachable
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

decision.rationale: integrate electronics, battery and wireless into one dorsal module

verification.check: lid opens without tools and connectors stay reachable

evolution.leaves_for_next: lid opens without tools and connectors stay reachable | mit: Print band as open ring with fillet edges; calibrate TPU flow on a coupon first.

objective.definition: Deliver per-finger flexion resistance (grasp feel) while keeping linkage cartridges, actuators and electronics field-replaceable and the glove comfortable to don.
objective.failure_rule: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

constraint: raceway opens via quick release and keeps wiring separable

trade_off.gain: cleaner routing and fewer separate covers
trade_off.guardrail: raceway opens via quick release and keeps wiring separable
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Resistance fidelity fails if finger linkages bind, cable routing is blocked, or a module cannot be swapped without full teardown.

decision.rationale: combine cable and tendon routing in the wrist band raceway but keep them separable

verification.check: raceway opens via quick release and keeps wiring separable

evolution.leaves_for_next: raceway opens via quick release and keeps wiring separable | mit: Hold 0.2mm pin clearance and deburr holes; verify with free-motion check.
